debtor_code.text: ประเภทลูกหนี้

root.sql: select tab.* from ( SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name , sc_mem_ucf_debtor.debtor_desc , (select dividend + average_return from sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail where sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and account_year = (select max(stock_detail.account_year) from sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail stock_detail where stock_detail.membership_no = sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no ) ) as amount_div_aver from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_ucf_debtor where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code = sc_mem_ucf_debtor.debtor_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_ucf_debtor.debtor_code = 'EL' )tab order by tab.member_group_no
